title: Factory Block
description:
This adds a duping block.
Hold an item, and right click on the block to dupe.
Works with hoppers.
body:
A factory block can be used to produce stacks of any item it is given. To use it, right click on the block with any item, and it will disappear into the block. Until someone puts a new item in the factory block, anyone with an empty hand can pull as many stacks of the item out of the block as they want.

This mod was originally a joke on my part. I see devs rush to fix duping bugs the moment they appear in a mod or in the vanilla game. How funny would it be if I added a mod whose sole purpose is to enable duping as an intended feature?

As it turns out, the idea has a lot more merit than I originally intended. Adding duping to the game as a fully respectable, intended feature apparently incentivizes exploration in a way the vanilla game never did for me. Suddenly it is worth your time to acquire any single item, no matter how rare or hard it is to farm, because you can immediately have as many as you want. Build freely, without worrying about collecting tons of supplies. It's a whole new world out there.

**This mod only works if it is installed on both server and client. It does not enable any clientside duping glitches on servers that do not support it.**
